description: A customer who recently bought a truck wants to purchase and have a bed liner installed.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and their vehicle to ensure the correct accessory is selected.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies the customer and their 2023 Ranger.

nodes.task_description: Check parts inventory for the correct bed liner and provide a quote for the part and installation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the part is in stock and provides a total price.

nodes.task_description: Process the sale and schedule a service appointment for the installation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent completes the sale and books the installation appointment.
